metadata.title: Raw Material Price Library for Piping Materials
metadata.note: Rates are indicative raw material input prices only. They are not finished pipe prices. Finished pipe price shall include conversion, forming, welding or piercing, heat treatment, testing, inspection, certification, wastage, freight, taxes and supplier margin.
metadata.year_logic: Use yearly_rate_inr_per_kg[PO Year].recommended for selected app year; 2026 is retained in rate_inr_per_kg for backward compatibility.
metadata.factor_note: factor_wrt_cs_by_year compares raw material recommended Rs/kg with Carbon Steel recommended Rs/kg for the same year.
